title: Swarm Discussion Quality Block
description: Runtime-owned discussion-quality block (ADR 0002 / plan 009), surfaced on the round record and in trace/evidence. Structural fields (counterEdgeCount, positionShiftCount, stressTriggered) are computed by the runtime and are authoritative — a stored block that disagrees is rejected (quality_signal_mismatch). genuineDisagreement and minorityReportPresent are coordinator-produced and advisory.
